results.overview: Walter White, a New Mexico chemistry teacher, is diagnosed with Stage III cancer and given a prognosis of only two years left to live. He becomes filled with a sense of fearlessness and an unrelenting desire to secure his family's financial future at any cost as he enters the dangerous world of drugs and crime.
results.name: Breaking Bad

results.overview: Breaking Bad: Original Minisodes is a web series based on the television series Breaking Bad. A total of 17 "minisodes", which are more comedy-oriented than most full episodes, were released over the course of three years.
results.name: Breaking Bad: Original Minisodes

results.overview: During the Ming Dynasty, the emperor sets out for Xinjiang to advocate peace. Shortly after his absence, mysterious occurrences plague the palace and Daoist Tian Mu Tong is called to cast out demons. Together with eunuch Xiao Mo Gu and Jin Yi Wei leader Yun Xiang Rong, Mu Tong uncovers deep dark secrets and conspiracies hidden within conspiracies.
results.name: Breaking Bad Fortune Teller

results.original_name: Breaking the Deal with My Hockey Bad Boy
results.overview: Jane has a crush on stepbrother Nate. Her enemy Zach Gates discovers this secret. When Nate's girlfriend Melissa threatens to expose Jane's story, Zach suggests they fake date to protect her. Their pretense leads to unexpected feelings.
results.name: Breaking the Deal with My Hockey Bad Boy

results.overview: How did the Bad Guys break into the bad guy business in the first place? Find out in this hilarious prequel series set before the hit films.
results.name: The Bad Guys: The Series
